title: neotinea commutata
intro: Neotinea commutata is a species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Neotinea commutata can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to be effective in alleviating symptoms and promoting overall well-being.
